name: Narrator
notes: Third-person literary narrator; intentionally separate from the character Nix.
voice_design_prompt: A mature adult feminine narrator with a smoky mezzo-contralto, open chest-and-mouth resonance, clean subtle grain, precise natural diction, and an unhurried literary cadence. Neutral American accent. Restrained warmth, dry intelligence, controlled danger, and generous paragraph pauses. Never sing-song, melodramatic, breathless, or run-on.

profile.mannerisms: small reflective pauses; paragraph endings receive room
profile.intensity: build by degrees and protect punch lines
profile.avoid: sing-song delivery, melodrama, run-on pacing, character impersonation
profile.pronunciation: Use the Pangea pronunciation guide when available.

name: Nix
voice: Wiry low alto with knife-edge wit
notes: Central female character; defensive humor, tactical thinking, reluctant loyalty.
voice_design_prompt: An adult feminine character voice in a wiry low alto, lighter and more forward than the narrator, with lean chest resonance, dry clean texture, crisp consonants, and fast tactical timing. Neutral fantasy-American speech with dockside informality. Sarcasm covers fear and loyalty; become quieter and more exact under threat. Do not use a stately narrator cadence.

profile.register: low alto, lighter and younger in placement than Narrator
profile.resonance: forward mouth placement with a lean chest core
profile.pace: quick when planning or deflecting; slower when sincerity escapes
profile.cadence: clipped observations followed by precisely timed deadpan turns
profile.emotional_range: sarcasm and irritation over guarded fear, tenderness, and fierce loyalty
profile.mannerisms: tiny pause before an insult; swallows vulnerable admissions; questions often challenge
profile.intensity: gets quieter and more exact under threat; shouts only for command or immediate danger
profile.avoid: Narrator's stately cadence, broad comedy, constant rasp, breathless speed
profile.pronunciation: Nix: niks. Keep names and nautical commands crisp.

name: Ressa
notes: Capable courier and Ferryman associate; knows more than she explains.
voice_design_prompt: An adult feminine voice in a weathered mid-low alto with relaxed chest resonance, smooth control, economical pacing, and cool private amusement. Neutral coastal-fantasy accent. She is capable, observant, and rarely explains more than necessary; firmness comes without raised volume.

profile.cadence: short statements with amused space around Nix's reactions
profile.emotional_range: professional calm, private amusement, quiet vigilance
profile.mannerisms: lets smiles enter the voice instead of laughing; rarely over-explains
profile.avoid: mystical whispering, smug caricature, copying Nix's bite

name: Tamsin
voice: Grounded warm mezzo with moral steel
notes: Protective healer; compassion expressed as practical action and blunt ethical clarity.
voice_design_prompt: An adult feminine voice in a warm middle mezzo with grounded chest-and-mask resonance, clear direct diction, steady pacing, and moral authority. Compassion sounds practical rather than sentimental. During medical urgency she becomes quicker and precise; when someone is endangered she becomes cold and firm, not loud.

profile.texture: clear, warm, faintly worn by responsibility
profile.pace: steady; quicker only during medical urgency
profile.cadence: complete thoughts, firm corrections, gentle checks on the vulnerable
profile.emotional_range: patience, moral anger, protective fear, restrained affection
profile.mannerisms: brief inhale before contradicting cruelty; softens names when reassuring
profile.intensity: authority comes from steadiness; cold precision when someone is endangered
profile.avoid: maternal caricature, fragile breathiness, sentimental overplaying

name: Flint
notes: Cindrel protector; sparse speech, physical certainty, and understated humor.
voice_design_prompt: An adult feminine Cindrel voice in a low contralto with dense grounded chest resonance, matte mineral texture, deliberate pace, sparse phrasing, and understated dry humor. Use a subtle invented Cindrel coloring without imitating a real-world dialect. Protective force appears by dropping lower and firmer, never as a monster growl.

profile.resonance: dense chest resonance with grounded placement
profile.cadence: few words; clean stops; dry replies land without decoration
profile.diction: broad, firm consonants; no wasted syllables
profile.accent: subtle invented Cindrel coloring; consistent and intelligible
profile.emotional_range: contained concern, blunt humor, sudden protective force
profile.mannerisms: answers after assessing; pain shortens breath but never weakens focus
profile.intensity: drops lower and firmer before action
profile.avoid: monster growl, slow stupidity, constant aggression, heavy real-world dialect
profile.pronunciation: Cindrel: SIN-drell unless the book guide overrides.

name: The Ferryman
voice: Cultivated low baritone with dangerous ease
notes: Male strategist and mentor figure; affectionate manipulation delivered as civilized certainty.
voice_design_prompt: An older adult masculine voice in a cultivated low baritone with smooth chest resonance, polished dark texture, immaculate relaxed diction, and leisurely confidence. He uses balanced sentences, deliberate names, dry affection, and strategic silence. When dangerous he becomes simpler and quieter. Avoid a booming announcer voice or theatrical villain purr.

profile.resonance: smooth chest resonance with effortless projection
profile.pace: leisurely because he expects to be heard
profile.cadence: balanced sentences, elegant pivots, amusement held to the final word
profile.accent: neutral transregional fantasy with cultivated formality
profile.emotional_range: dry affection, strategic patience, veiled menace, rare gravity
profile.mannerisms: uses names deliberately; lets silence do part of the bargaining
profile.intensity: becomes simpler and quieter when most dangerous
profile.avoid: villain purr, booming announcer voice, copying Craven's official rigidity
profile.pronunciation: Ferryman remains a title; emphasize The only when dramatically warranted.

name: Orra
voice: Clear high mezzo with alert conviction
notes: Direct, observant, and urgent; questions seek real answers rather than performance.
voice_design_prompt: An adult feminine Winterkin voice in a clear high mezzo with forward placement, clean texture, attentive articulation, and alert conviction. Moderate pace that accelerates under real danger. Direct questions seek answers; warnings become bright and firm rather than shrill. Avoid childlike pitch or panicked delivery.

profile.texture: clean with a fine edge under stress
profile.pace: moderate, accelerating when stakes become clear
profile.mannerisms: small lift on genuine questions; clips words when issuing warnings
profile.intensity: brightens and firms rather than shouting indiscriminately
profile.avoid: childlike pitch, panic as a default, sing-song questions

name: Lio
voice: Fluid mid alto with current-reader focus
notes: Merryn current reader; practical, sensory, and decisive at sea.
voice_design_prompt: An adult feminine Merryn voice in a fluid mid alto with open placement, cool clear texture, even pace, and precise directional diction. Give her a subtle invented Merryn musicality without copying any real-world accent. She pauses as if listening before reporting the water, then cuts cleanly through noise with decisive nautical commands.

profile.resonance: open mouth placement with fluid breath support
profile.pace: even until reading danger, then quick and exact
profile.cadence: flowing clauses that snap into nautical commands
profile.accent: subtle invented Merryn musicality; never a real-world imitation
profile.emotional_range: watchful calm, professional alarm, dry crew humor
profile.mannerisms: brief listening pause before reporting what the water is doing
profile.intensity: cuts cleanly through noise without shrieking
profile.avoid: watery sound effects, exotic caricature, dreamy vagueness

name: Vessa
notes: Resourceful former prisoner; irreverent, observant, and unsentimental.
voice_design_prompt: An adult feminine voice in a compact middle mezzo with bright grain, forward placement, quick practical pacing, punchy remarks, and casual crisp diction. Neutral dockside-fantasy accent. Her irreverence never interrupts the task; pressure makes her faster and sharper. Keep her distinct from Nix and avoid comic-sidekick caricature.

profile.pace: quick, especially when solving a problem
profile.emotional_range: skepticism, mischief, alarm converted rapidly into action
profile.mannerisms: talks while working; jokes do not interrupt the task
profile.intensity: gets faster and sharper under pressure
profile.avoid: comic sidekick squeak, coyness, copying Nix's exact sarcasm

name: Sable
voice: Light clear alto with stubborn curiosity
notes: Younger former prisoner; hungry for explanations, safety, and ordinary possibilities.
voice_design_prompt: A young feminine voice in a light clear alto with forward placement, plain unpolished diction, wary energy, and stubborn curiosity. Questions may come in clusters; fear briefly thins the voice, while a useful task steadies it. Sound young without using a baby voice, exaggerated innocence, or constant trembling.

profile.pace: quick for questions; careful when uncertain
profile.emotional_range: curiosity, hunger, wary hope, flashes of fear
profile.mannerisms: questions arrive in clusters; wonder is allowed without childish exaggeration
profile.intensity: voice thins under fear, then steadies when given a task
profile.avoid: baby voice, precocious caricature, constant trembling

name: Pell
voice: Agile mid tenor with anxious comic timing
notes: Former harbor-gear thief and reluctant pump expert; complaints coexist with competence.
voice_design_prompt: An adult masculine voice in an agile mid tenor with light chest resonance, a very subtle forward nasal edge, ordinary rough texture, and fast reactive pacing. Neutral harbor-fantasy speech. Complaints tumble with anxious comic timing, but competence remains credible. Avoid a buffoon voice, relentless whining, or extreme nasality.

profile.resonance: light chest with forward nasal edge kept subtle
profile.cadence: complaints tumble, then stop cleanly at Nix's answer
profile.emotional_range: anxiety, incredulity, practical courage, food-driven delight
profile.mannerisms: starts objections before deciding whether they are wise
profile.intensity: pitch rises modestly under chaos; commands remain understandable
profile.avoid: buffoon voice, whining every line, extreme nasal caricature

name: Craven
notes: Craven Resh, High Accord Marshall; disciplined, exact, and morally bounded beneath official control.
voice_design_prompt: An adult masculine voice in a restrained low-mid baritone with centered chest resonance, clean cool texture, measured pace, and precise legal diction. Subtle invented Avenor formality. Authority grows through stillness and clipped corrections; irritation stays controlled and reluctant amusement is rare. Never a generic villain, robot, or booming officer.

profile.cadence: formal declarations; clipped corrections; minimal conversational waste
profile.accent: neutral Avenor formality; invented and subtle
profile.emotional_range: controlled irritation, duty, reluctant amusement, moral resolve
profile.mannerisms: jaw-tight pauses; emphasizes validity, names, and boundaries
profile.intensity: authority increases through stillness, not volume
profile.avoid: generic villain, robotic monotone, booming cop voice, Ferryman's languor
profile.pronunciation: Craven RESSH. Avenor: AV-eh-nor unless guide overrides.

name: Arlen Voss
voice: Rough middle baritone with a healer's command
notes: Skilled healer first encountered disheveled; medical attention abruptly clarifies his delivery.
voice_design_prompt: An adult masculine voice in a rough middle baritone with loose chest placement, dry lived-in texture, and uneven social pacing. Outside work he uses irritable fragments; the instant a patient is endangered his diction becomes brisk, exact, and commanding. Neutral marsh-port fantasy accent. Avoid drunken caricature or incompetence.

profile.resonance: loose chest voice that centers during treatment
profile.pace: uneven socially; brisk and exact while healing
profile.cadence: irritable fragments outside work, decisive imperatives during it
profile.diction: slightly blurred at rest, surgically clear on medical terms
profile.emotional_range: irritation, professional focus, bruised dignity, guarded concern
profile.mannerisms: sniffs or resets before concentrating; no comic slur during medical work
profile.intensity: sobriety enters the voice the instant a patient is in danger
profile.avoid: drunken caricature, incompetent healer, constant growl

name: Orven
voice: Expressive high baritone with indignant precision
notes: Healer transported under disputed circumstances; theatrical complaints conceal real competence.
voice_design_prompt: An adult masculine voice in an expressive high baritone with open chest-and-mask resonance, warm rumpled texture, articulate diction, and bursts of rapid indignant protest. His theatrical distinctions conceal a competent healer who narrows into calm professional focus during treatment. Avoid continuous slurring or a farce-only performance.

profile.pace: bursts of rapid protest followed by professional clarity
profile.emotional_range: outrage, comic self-defense, medical concern, resourceful focus
profile.mannerisms: stresses technical distinctions; gathers dignity mid-sentence
profile.intensity: projects when protesting but narrows into calm for treatment
profile.avoid: continuous drunken slur, farce-only performance, copying Arlen's roughness

name: Minor / Unnamed Roles
voice: Casting pool — officers, vendors, hosts, prisoners, and officials
notes: Flexible synthetic ensemble for brief unnamed speakers; assign role variants during scene review.
voice_design_prompt: Create a natural minor-role voice appropriate to the line's stated character, using varied feminine and masculine adult presentations. Give each recurring role one restrained identifying trait while keeping narration and principal characters dominant. Use only subtle invented regional coloring; avoid caricatures, extreme accents, or reusing a principal character's signature voice.

profile.register: varied; keep each scene role distinct from principals
profile.pace: driven by immediate function and stakes
profile.cadence: official, mercantile, frightened, or communal as the text requires
profile.accent: light invented regional coloring only when text supports it
profile.mannerisms: one restrained identifying trait per recurring minor role
profile.intensity: protect the principal dialogue and narration
profile.avoid: caricatures, reused principal voices, extreme accents, attention-stealing performances
